# Universal Hardware-Aware Compute Runtime

> The Universal Hardware-Aware Compute Runtime (UHCR) is a high-performance Python framework for hardware-optimized computation and JIT compilation.

## Documentation
- [Introduction](https://uhcr-docs.vercel.app/#/docs/introduction)
- [How UHCR Works](https://uhcr-docs.vercel.app/#/docs/how-uhcr-works)
- [Installation](https://uhcr-docs.vercel.app/#/docs/installation)
- [Quick Start Guide](https://uhcr-docs.vercel.app/#/docs/quick-start)
- [API Reference](https://uhcr-docs.vercel.app/#/docs/api)
